title: Quran, Sura 96: Al-Alaq
description: Sura 96 (Al-Alaq: The Clot) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 96 (Al-Alaq: The Clot) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Recite in the name of your Lord who created — created man from a clinging substance. Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous, who taught by the pen — taught man that which he knew not.
